# step-and-confirm (known-good)

Domain-light illustration. Expect **pass** on R4, R7, R8.

## Agent

I can install the CLI and run the checks myself. The only step I need from you is a browser login.

1. A browser window should open (or open the URL I print next).
2. Sign in with the account you want to use for this project.
3. When you see a page that says **Success** or **Authenticated**, tell me.

I will wait here until you confirm. I will not create the remote repo until that succeeds.

Device URL: `https://example.com/device`  
Code: `ABCD-1234`

## Operator

I see Success.

## Agent

Confirmed. Next I will create the private repo and clone it. I will run those commands, not you.
